programme.desc: Distracted by her own heavy thoughts, Andini (Ariel Tatum) accidentally hits Damar (Lucky Perdana) with her motorcycle. programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 154
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Bule Depok Minta Dinaturalisasi Demi Cinta
programme.desc: Rafael (Dylan Carr) is a handsome foreigner living in a local village, but there's a catch: he speaks Indonesian with a thick, comical Javanese accent, earning him the nickname 'Bule Depok.' He falls in love with Aminah (Syahnaz Sadiqah), a beautiful traditional dodol vendor. While Aminah feels the same, her father is strictly against her marrying a foreigner, insisting that she should only be with a local man.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 608
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

She starts a unique shoe laundry business, and despite her stutter, her sincerity makes the business a huge success. Along the way, she meets Dimas (Qausar Harta Yudana), a kind-hearted man who steps in to help her care for her grandmother in her time of need.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 154
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Buku Nikahku Butuh Nama Kamu
programme.desc: Elsa (Nabila Zavira) is a tough security guard trainer. Deden (Erdin Werdrayana), an office boy looking to earn more for his girlfriend, decides to apply for a security position. However, his instructor is none other than Elsa-the woman whose car he accidentally scratched while teaching his girlfriend how to ride a motorcycle. Talk about a bad first impression!

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 608
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Kue Suka Sama Elu, Kita Merit Yuk
programme.desc: When Laras (Nabila Zavira) gets pickpocketed, the ensuing chaos leads to her accidentally ruining the special cake Samuel bought for his grandmother. Samuel (Cakrawala Airawan) demands a replacement, but he scoffs at the humble cakes Laras sells, calling them unhygienic. Can Laras prove that her homemade treats are worth more than a fancy store bought cake?

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 103
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: ENERGI CINTA CINDERELLA MATRE
programme.desc: Yunita Siregar is dreaming of a rich and handsome husband, though it feels like reaching for the moon. When Lucky Perdana enters the picture, she wonders if he finally fits her criteria. But the road to love isn't clear, as Rizky Billar is ready to swoop in and steal her heart from behind the scenes.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 155
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Ogah Pacaran Semua Cewek Sama Aja!
programme.desc: Both nursing broken hearts, Farel and Rachel decide to team up. Farel's management hires Rachel-a martial arts expert-to become a film star who will 'kick' Farel on screen. However, their collaboration hits a snag when Rachel hears a rumor that Farel secretly enjoys belittling others.

programme.title: GURU KARATEKU KECE BADAI
programme.desc: Distracted by her own heavy thoughts, Andini (Ariel Tatum) accidentally hits Damar (Lucky Perdana) with her motorcycle. She manages to flee, but Damar later finds her being chased by a group of people. Even though Damar saves her, he's annoyed because instead of thanking him, Andini lashes out. However, knowing Damar is a karate instructor, Andini eventually begs him to be her personal bodyguard.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 155
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Bule Depok Minta Dinaturalisasi Demi Cinta
programme.desc: Rafael (Dylan Carr) is a handsome foreigner living in a local village, but there's a catch: he speaks Indonesian with a thick, comical Javanese accent, earning him the nickname 'Bule Depok.' He falls in love with Aminah (Syahnaz Sadiqah), a beautiful traditional dodol vendor. While Aminah feels the same, her father is strictly against her marrying a foreigner, insisting that she should only be with a local man.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 609
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Mencintaimu Bikin Hatiku Megap Megap
programme.desc: Laras (Larasati Nugroho) is a hardworking girl living with her sickly grandmother. She starts a unique shoe laundry business, and despite her stutter, her sincerity makes the business a huge success. Along the way, she meets Dimas (Qausar Harta Yudana), a kind-hearted man who steps in to help her care for her grandmother in her time of need.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 104
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: DISERUDUK CINTA KONGLOMERAT KW
programme.desc: To help her fussy younger brother, Sarah (Angelica Simperler) heads to a village to find her former helper, Bi Ijah. On the way, she nearly hits a runaway sheep belonging to Gilang (Ridho Ilahi). Since Gilang is Bi Ijah's son, he lets the incident slide. Seeing an opportunity to escape an arranged marriage, Sarah suddenly asks Gilang to pose as a fake billionaire.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 156
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Ngeselin Tapi Ngangenin Pemirsa
programme.desc: The headstrong Reno (Alzi Markers) is determined to apply as a teacher at a private school. Unfortunately, he has to deal with Intan (Larasati Nugroho), a beautiful but fussy and talkative fellow teacher. Their bickering makes Reno's life miserable, even leading to him getting sprayed with water by the students because of her antics.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 610
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: DISERUDUK CINTA KONGLOMERAT KW

On the way, she nearly hits a runaway sheep belonging to Gilang (Ridho Ilahi). Since Gilang is Bi Ijah's son, he lets the incident slide. Seeing an opportunity to escape an arranged marriage, Sarah suddenly asks Gilang to pose as a fake billionaire.

programme.title: Kulepas Dengan Ikhlas - EP 9
programme.desc: Kisah cinta tiga segi berpunca daripada kemalangan dan perselisihan faham antara Kejora, gadis yang meneruskan kerjaya sebagai jurusolek, Reza dan Kevin, abang kepada Reza.

programme.title: Kail Pagi Makan Petang - EP 6
programme.desc: Program mengisahkan tentang teknik memancing dan ikuti pengembaran mereka untuk mengetahui ikan yang ditangkap dan masakan menarik yang akan disediakan.

programme.title: Potong - EP 6
programme.desc: Kisah mengenai seorang pemuda Midun, yang kini menyambung legasi perkhidmatan berkhatan tradisional peninggalan arwah bapanya, seorang Tok Mudim handal di kampung.

programme.title: Punchline - EP 20
programme.desc: Lebih meriah, lebih kecoh! Saksikan program variasi terbaharu yang menampilkan Dato' AC Mizal beraksi bersama PS Mansur dan tetamu jemputan yang bakal membuat anda tidak kering gusi!

programme.title: Hantu Raya Pergi Perang - EP 4
programme.desc: Kadir Osman seorang bangsa Kg Geliga, membuat keputusan untuk mendapatkan hantu raya dari Pawangis untuk mengorat cinta hatinya Manisah dan menggantikan dirinya di medan perang apabila Null Corp menyerang.

programme.title: Bas Ria - EP 16
programme.desc: Bas Ria bakal menyaksikan pasukan Bas Ria "memburu" selebriti-selebriti di dalam "hit list" mereka? Untuk apa? Untuk mendapatkan sesuatu yang berharga dari mereka.

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Live 2024 - EP 2
programme.desc: Berhibur bersama geng Sepahtu.

programme.title: Megat Extend - EP 6
programme.desc: Kisah komedi kehidupan di kampus sekumpulan pelajar yang tinggal bersama-sama di rumah milik senior mereka, Megat, pelajar senior yang 'in denial' dan tidak mahu untuk meninggalkan kehidupan kampus.

programme.title: Gelap Geli Tak - EP 5
programme.desc: Game show terbaru di hoskan oleh Faizal Ismail. Peserta bersaing antara satu sama lain dalam pelbagai cabaran, tapi muslihatnya mereka ditempatkan dalam persekitaran gelap gelita

programme.title: Tabung Gelak Warna - EP 17
programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk tontonan anda semua.

programme.title: Pulau Ke Pulau - EP 2
programme.desc: Sebuah drama untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Pecah Perut - EP 7

programme.title: Dahlia - EP 2
programme.desc: Dahlia memiliki segalanya, namun semuanya musnah akibat sikap khianat kawan baiknya sendiri yang ingin merampas semua miliknya termasuk suami, anak & harta.

programme.title: Kennot Brain 2021 - EP 16
programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Lawak Sorang - Sorang - EP 2

programme.title: Bila Aidil Ada Fitri - EP 2
programme.desc: Pada Raya tahun lepas, Fitri dan Aidilmempunyai masalah dimana Fitri soal jodoh Aidil pula putus tunang. Fitri menyelamatkan Datin Mariam dari diragut dan dia meminta Fitri menjadi P.A anaknya.

programme.title: Opah Popular - EP 7
programme.desc: Badrul dan Sofia bertugas di luar negara dan menghabiskan cuti dengan balik ke kampung. Anaknya mereka dipaksa untuk tinggal bersama opah.

programme.title: Berita Hangit - EP 2
programme.desc: Rancangan untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: #havocwarna - EP 2

programme.title: Aku Dan Tok Wan - EP 2
programme.desc: Tok Wan di hantar untuk duduk bersama cucunya, Amir kerana Tok Wan menghidapi kencing manis dan di arahkan tinggal bersama ahli keluarga untuk mendapat jagaan rapi

programme.title: Super Wira - EP 1
programme.desc: Aman tiada kuasa istimewa tidak seperti ayahnya, ketua kumpulan Super Wira. Ibunya telah diculik oleh penjahat super yang misteri dan Aman cuba untuk menyelamatkannya.

programme.title: Jaguh Kampung 4 - EP 5
programme.desc: Candawara masak-memasak paling gempak ini menyaksikan persaingan di antara jaguh-jaguh kampung

programme.desc: Saksikan selebriti popular merancang "prank" bersama geng mereka dan mengenakan mangsa terpilih. Berjayakan perancangan "prank" mereka? Sama-sama kita nantikan!

programme.title: Meja Panggang - EP 8
programme.desc: Saksikan mereka 'memanggang' para tetamu dengan soalan-soalan panas tentang kisah lampau dan peribadi mereka.

programme.desc: Karoot Komedia adalah sebuah rancangan komedi muzikal 30 minit yang menggabungkan muzik, lakonan sketsa dengan topik-topik menarik yang akan dilakonkan secara spontan.

programme.desc: Tabung Lawak ialah pelbagai klip video pendek untuk menekankan topik-topik hangat dalam cara yang lucu

programme.title: Motif Sosial? - EP 26
programme.desc: Kesinambungan Motif Viral, kali ini melalui eksperimen sosial yang viral dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.title: Ex Aku Pontianak - EP 6
programme.desc: Kantoi jumpa wanita lain, Malik ditinggalkan Bella yang rupanya adalah pontianak. Malik mula diganggu lalu minta bantuan Suraya, pemburu pontianak untuk tangkap Bella dan juga zombie suruhannya!

programme.title: Impiana S3 - EP 6
programme.desc: Impiana musim ke-3 ini berkonsepkan tentang "Dekorasi Homestay Impiana" menampilkan dua buah rumah yang memberi inspirasi kepada penonton dan dihoskan oleh Fiza Frizzy.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna - EP 26
programme.desc: Qistina masih bersusah-payah untuk mencari Luqman. Luqman mula percaya dengan kata-kata hasutan orang-orang di sekelilingnya hingga merasakan yang Qistina dan Herni mungkin sebenarnya adalah penipu.

programme.title: Punitha

programme.title: LAKSHMI
programme.desc: Maha, her family’s financial backbone, marries Selvam, on condition that she will continue to support her family financially even after marriage. Post which they confront challenges that put the family’s peace and happiness to test.

programme.title: IRU MALARGAL
programme.desc: When secrets, societal pressure, and an unexpected wedding come between three childhood friends-Aadhi, Magizhini, and Madhiyazhagi-tradition and emotions clash, turning their lives upside down and testing every bond they hold dear.

programme.title: AADUKALAM
programme.desc: Sathya loves her sister like a second mother & believes compassion outweighs all riches. But, Selvanayagi, a woman of pride & privilege, worships money & social status. When their worlds collide, what trials will Sathya face in her fight for justice?

programme.title: Movie- VEDI

programme.title: Veerame Vaagai Soodum - EP 1
programme.desc: A normal man from a middle-class family questioning the authorities for abusing their powers.

programme.title: Sahoo - EP 1
programme.desc: An undercover agent and his partner pursue a thief who stole 2,000 crore rupees, only to discover the case is connected to a crime lord's death and a brewing gang war.

programme.title: Freetcket - EP 1
programme.desc: The host presents a curated compilation of hit songs and memorable snippets from the most popular and trending Tamil movies, celebrating the best of Tamil cinema.

programme.title: Kather Basha Engira Muthuramalingam - EP 1
programme.desc: Nana, a powerful gangster, vies for control of a village. However, Kathar, an honest man, strives for peace, resulting in a clash between the two.

programme.title: Kuttram 23 - EP 1
programme.desc: ACP Vetrimaaran unravels a crime racket involving medical professionals. However, his task becomes harder every day as the case becomes murkier and complex.

programme.title: Thamilarasan - EP 1
programme.desc: An honest police officer gets in to a conflict with Rana. Their enmity worsens when Tamilarasan refuses to obey Rana's order in a critical situation.

programme.title: Pongalukku Varugirom - EP 1
programme.desc: Ex-cop Y.D. Raju agrees to assist his ex-girlfriend ACP Meenakshi in a high-profile kidnapping case. He finds himself in a fix when his wife, Bhagyalakshmi, insists on accompanying them.

programme.title: Anandam Vilayadum Veedu - EP 1
programme.desc: Story evolves around two sets of half brother's. Periya aambala married twice and he got lots of children from both wife's. Saravanan and his siblings from the first wife, Cheran and siblings from the second. Saravanan decides to build a house with Cherans support so both families can live together.

programme.title: Dikkiloona - EP 1
programme.desc: Mani, a lineman for the electricity board, comes across a time machine. He uses the device to travel back to the past and change his life.

programme.title: Mr And Mrs Arjun - EP 1
programme.desc: Arjun, a spoiled young man, grows jealous of his neighbor Anu's admiration and discovers her plans to study abroad, plotting to sabotage her dreams and ruin her chance at a brighter future.

programme.title: Pattathu Yaanai - EP 1
programme.desc: Saravanan and his friends come to Trichy to set up a new restaurant business. However, their plans get interrupted when he gets an order from a local gangster but falls for his girlfriend, Aishwarya.

programme.title: Dabangg 3 - EP 1
programme.desc: ASP Chulbul Pandey encounters a foe from his past after he arrests a pimp, Chinti Walia. However, he must face his demons and defeat his enemy before it is too late.

programme.title: Freetcket - EP 1
programme.desc: The host presents a curated compilation of hit songs and memorable snippets from the most popular and trending Tamil movies, celebrating the best of Tamil cinema.

programme.title: Irumugan - EP 1
programme.desc: Following the attack on the Indian Embassy in Malaysia, Akhilan, an ex-agent, is assigned to track down the culprit. His investigations lead him to his old foe who has now developed a hazardous drug.

programme.title: Cock Tail - EP 1
programme.desc: In a small town, three girls named Vaishali are murdered in one night by a Joker-like figure. Aspiring hero Vikram is entangled in the mystery: will he solve the case and save himself?

programme.title: Haraa - EP 1
programme.desc: Ram's happy life shatters when his daughter supposedly dies. He investigates, uncovering medical scams and a prostitution ring. He rescues Nimisha, revealing she was to be sold.

programme.title: Madha Yaanai Koottam - EP 1
programme.desc: Prithivi kill his uncle's son unfortunately. So his uncle and other family members take revenge on him.

programme.title: Rathinam - EP 1
programme.desc: Rathnam works as a henchman under MLA Panner Selvam. A girl travels to Vellore for an interview and a few rowdies try to kill her but Rathnam saves her and becomes her guardian angel. How long can he protect her?

programme.title: Kanni Raasi - EP 1
programme.desc: A joint family that supports only love marriages struggles to persuade their youngest member to fall in love, facing stubbornness, doubts, and heartfelt family dynamics.

programme.title: Kiss - EP 1
programme.desc: A street musician discovers he can glimpse couples' futures when they kiss. When a vision reveals his love, he races to defy destiny and change it.

programme.title: Mark Antony - EP 1
programme.desc: Mark, the son of a former gangster, comes across a mobile phone that can time-travel. Using the phone, Mark acquires the ability to save his estranged mother from a grim fate.

programme.title: Veera - EP 600
programme.desc: Rannvijay raises his half-sister Veera as his own child, while their mother Ratan, though showing contempt towards Veera, secretly supports her son in raising her.

programme.title: Chinnanchiru Kiliye - EP 179
programme.desc: Indhu, a self-made woman who won't bow or borrow, clashes with Karna, an enforcer of fear-driven patriarchy, triggering a powerful upheaval that shakes the empire everywhere.

programme.title: Parijadam - EP 170

programme.title: Magandang Buhay

programme.title: TFC Kids Zone
programme.desc: A programme block filled with animated short stories, nursery rhymes and songs, as well as Filipino language lessons, TFC Kids' Zone promises a rich treasure trove of learning and discovery that parents and their young ones will find enriching and empowering.

On the opposite side, a heavyweight from the police force and against whom she holds an enduring grudge. elodie is assaulted in the street. The prime suspect is none other than one of Nadia's clients.

Idriss's health causes increasing concern but, against everyone's advice, he's determined to ensure the defence of a young client suffering from schizophrenia, accused of killing a neighbour living in the flat next door.

programme.title: Meurtres En Bearn
programme.desc: A woman is found drowned at the foot of the majestic mountains of the Bearn. Jeanne and Heloise head the investigation. programme.title: Movie - Dsp
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Sattam Oru Iruttu Arai
programme.desc: Siblings Vijay and Sheela are in pursuit of the men who killed their father and sister. While Sheela wants to punish them in the court of law, Vijay takes the law into his own hands.

programme.title: Movie - Krishna Krishnaa
programme.desc: Gopalakrishnan, an innocent young man, struggles to reconcile his cunning mother and Bama, his morally upright wife. However, when she suspects him of having bad habits, she decides to leave him.

programme.title: Movie - Thaai Manasu
programme.desc: Thangapandi is a revered man in his village and ensures justice and peace prevail. His rival, Kangeyan, brainwashes Thangapandi's elder son and turns him against Thangapandi.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Rudhra
programme.desc: Mayandi kills inspector Gopal and his family except for Rudhra, who finds evidence against him and shows it to the police. However, when an officer begins torturing her, Rudhra vows to kill Mayandi.

programme.title: Movie - Thaaye Neeye Thunai
programme.desc: When Seeta suddenly loses her vision on the night of her marriage, she decides to hide the truth from her husband. Trouble ensues when her husband learns about her condition.

programme.title: Movie - Vanavil
programme.desc: Surya, Prakash and Priya are three IAS aspirants. Surya and Priya fall in love and Prakash, her secret admirer, silently becomes an enemy posing as a friend who plots to get rid of Surya.

programme.title: Movie - Padhavi Pramanam
programme.desc: A convict escapes from jail and vows to kill a politician who betrayed him. When the latter is about to take oath as the state's chief minister, the convict hatches a plan to kidnap him.

programme.title: Movie - Amman
programme.desc: An evil man tries to bury a live virgin. A girl witnesses this and calls the police. As revenge, his mother vows to make the girl's life a misery, but the village goddess Amman protects her.

programme.title: Movie - Yes Madam
programme.desc: Although Sivaram is against marriage, he ends up marrying Gayatri. When Sumati and her son move into the house opposite Sivaram's house, Gayatri is shocked to learn that she is Sivaram's first wife.

programme.title: Movie - Thirudi Thirudan
programme.desc: Ramu, an aspiring businessman, and Jyothi, an aspiring model, both run away from home to pursue their dreams. They meet each other briefly on a train, and then part ways until fate throws them back together as they begin a life of crime.

programme.title: Movie - Aadikkam
programme.desc: Pandian is a cop who exploits Naga, a thug. When Naga finds out that Pandian raped a reporter, he changes his ways. Meanwhile, Pandian frames Guru for a murder so that he can marry his lover Priya.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Solla Marandha Kadhai
programme.desc: Sivadhanu, an educated but unemployed honest man, gets married to the daughter of a rich man and moves to their house. However, taunts and disrespect compel him to find a new job in another town.

programme.title: Movie - Aatha Un Kovilele
programme.desc: Marudhu works for Kasturi, who is engaged to Durai. Kasturi dislikes Durai's habits and falls for Marudhu.

programme.title: Movie - Enn Purushanthaan Enakkumattumthaan
programme.desc: Happily married, Vatsala looks after the family while her husband Marudhu works for her rich father. However, their peaceful life is interrupted when she suspects Marudhu of having an affair.

programme.title: Movie - Vetrivel Shakthivel
programme.desc: Although he has cleared his IPS, a man's father asks him to work in their clothing store. He loves a woman very much, but her past poses a problem. Also, his father may be connected to a terrorist outfit.

programme.title: Movie - Marutha
programme.desc: Brazen money lender Kaali's husband gifts a large amount as seimurai to his doting sister's family event. Unable to return the favour, Meenakshi's husband ends his life. Can Meenakshi regain her honour when Kaali arranges a seimurai after 20 years?

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON - 2009/2010 (GB: DROGBA)
programme.desc: We take a look back at some of the most spectacular and important goals from previous Premier League seasons.

programme.title: REVIEW - TUE 24 FEB
programme.desc: Review brings you all the action from Matchweek 27, as Brighton travel to Brentford, Newcastle face Manchester City in Manchester, and Everton host Manchester United in Monday night's game.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 31
programme.desc: This week, The Big Interview sits down with Newcastle United's Malick Thiaw to discuss his journey to the Premier League. Growing up in Dusseldorf within a multicultural family, the German International reflects on his early life and the role models that shaped him. Rising through the academy systems of various Bundesliga clubs, Thiaw made his mark at Schalke 04 before donning the famous Rossoneri shirt of AC Milan where he won the Supercoppa Italiana in 2025.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 22
programme.desc: From rural Brittany to the Premier League, Georginio Rutter has come a long way from the quiet streets of Plescop in North West France. Now a central figure in Brighton's hunt for continental qualification, Rutter's journey has seen him play in both Ligue 1 and the Bundesliga, as well as being a transfer record signing for both Leeds and the Seagulls.

programme.title: PL BEST OF... PREMIER LEAGUE FRENCH CONNECTION
programme.desc: A celebration of France's greatest football icons, featuring Thierry Henry, David Ginola, Robert Pires, Claude Makelele, Emmanuel Petit and many more.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 17
programme.desc: A tale of two seasons - Gary Cahill recalls the Chelsea championship campaigns of 2014/15 under Jose Mourinho, and 2016/17 with Antonio Conte at the helm.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 8
programme.desc: Darren Bent is one of a select number of players to have scored a century of goals in the Premier League. The prolific striker recalls his days at Ipswich, Charlton, Spurs, Sunderland, and Aston Villa and the goals he scored on his way to joining that elite group.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2009/2010 season.

programme.title: REVIEW - TUE 24 FEB
programme.desc: Review brings you all the action from Matchweek 27, as Brighton travel to Brentford, Newcastle face Manchester City in Manchester, and Everton host Manchester United in Monday night's game.

programme.title: REVIEW - SUN 01 MAR
programme.desc: Highlights from the latest Premier League Matchweek. Review incorporates all the key moments and manager reaction from every fixture, making it a must-see programme for all Premier League fans.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 25
programme.desc: In a career spanning 20 years, Petr Cech established himself as one of the greatest goalkeepers the game has ever seen. This week, The Big Interview sits down with the four-time Premier League champion to reflect on his playing career and the mentality it takes to be a goalkeeper at the very pinnacle of world football. Cech reflects on his journey from Plzen to becoming the only player record 200 clean sheets in the Premier League.

programme.title: THE ART OF... - EP 2
programme.desc: Legendary goalkeeper, Petr Cech, sits down with Will Perry to discuss the role of the goalkeeper in the Premier League and how it has changed over the years. Cech gives his unique insight into the mentality of a goalkeeper and reflects on his career before breaking down and analysing some of the key attributes that make a great goalkeeper. He also selects five iconic Premier League goalkeepers to build his dream keeper for the modern game.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 12
programme.desc: With his calm authority and impeccable technique in goal, David Seaman was known as "Safe Hands" for a reason. The legendary Arsenal number one recalls his two Premier League titles, his most memorable matches, and his favourite Gunners' team mates.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2016/2017 (CHE)
programme.desc: A review of all the best goals, action and drama from Premier League seasons past.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 17
programme.desc: A tale of two seasons - Gary Cahill recalls the Chelsea championship campaigns of 2014/15 under Jose Mourinho, and 2016/17 with Antonio Conte at the helm.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 20
programme.desc: This week's Big Interview sees two of Chelsea's biggest stars from different generations come together for a football masterclass. Considered one of the most technically gifted players the Premier League has ever seen, Gianfranco Zola visits the Chelsea training ground to talk to the man currently lighting up the Premier League, Cole Palmer, about various aspects of his game.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2009/2010 season.

programme.title: PL RIVALRIES - EP 3
programme.desc: Will Perry is joined by former Chelsea player Scott Minto and Manchester City icon Shaun Wright-Phillips as they delve into the memorable moments, and rivalries between the two giants of English football.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 6
programme.desc: We sit down with Claude Makelele to reflect on the career of a true midfield master. Celebrated for redefining the defensive midfield role, Makelele shares his memories of life in the Premier League, from joining Chelsea during a transformative era to becoming the heartbeat of a title-winning side. With insight from teammates, coaches, and opponents, we explore the intelligence, discipline, and influence that made his name synonymous with the position he perfected.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 25
programme.desc: In a career spanning 20 years, Petr Cech established himself as one of the greatest goalkeepers the game has ever seen. This week, The Big Interview sits down with the four-time Premier League champion to reflect on his playing career and the mentality it takes to be a goalkeeper at the very pinnacle of world football. Cech reflects on his journey from Plzen to becoming the only player record 200 clean sheets in the Premier League.

programme.title: THE ART OF... - EP 2
programme.desc: Legendary goalkeeper, Petr Cech, sits down with Will Perry to discuss the role of the goalkeeper in the Premier League and how it has changed over the years. Cech gives his unique insight into the mentality of a goalkeeper and reflects on his career before breaking down and analysing some of the key attributes that make a great goalkeeper. He also selects five iconic Premier League goalkeepers to build his dream keeper for the modern game.

programme.desc: Highlights from the latest Premier League Matchweek. Review incorporates all the key moments and manager reaction from every fixture, making it a must-see programme for all Premier League fans.

programme.desc: Will Perry is joined by former Chelsea player Scott Minto and Manchester City icon Shaun Wright-Phillips as they delve into the memorable moments, and rivalries between the two giants of English football.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 26
programme.desc: We sit down for an exclusive interview with the first of two new Premier League Hall of fame inductees, Eden Hazard. A celebrated footballer who lit up the English top-flight during his illustrious career; a winner of multiple domestic and European honours, he became a true legend of the Premier League era. He reflects on his rise to the top, the moments that defined his career, and the immense pride he feels at joining the elite ranks of the Premier League's greatest ever players.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 34
programme.desc: Extended sit-downs and more informal 'out and about' interviews with the Premier League's biggest stars, providing players with a platform to tell their story in their own words.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 44
programme.desc: With exclusive behind-the-scenes access, PL Stories spends time with Yakubu Aiyegbeni at Finchley Boxing Club, where he is forging a new path in the next chapter of his sporting life. We explore his growing passion for boxing and the discipline it demands, offering a fresh perspective on life after football. Alongside this new pursuit, Yakubu reflects on his remarkable journey from his early years in Nigeria to becoming one of the Premier League's most prolific and respected strikers.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 15
programme.desc: Gianfranco Zola signed for Chelsea in November 1996, aged 30. The Little Magician became a trailblazer as one of the Premier League's first genuine flair players, and by the time of his departure seven seasons later, he had established himself as an all-time great at Stamford Bridge.

We also travel back to France to uncover the formative experiences and influences that shaped one of football's most intriguing modern managers.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 41
programme.desc: We shine a spotlight on Unai Emery, tracing the journey of one of Europe's most meticulous and innovative coaches from his roots in Spain to the pinnacle of the Premier League. programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA JP Buys vs. Luthando Biko
programme.desc: This episode features a Bantamweight championship bout as current champion JP Buys faces off against interm champion Luthando Biko. Bonus coverage includes Shaun De Lange vs. Marcel Teniers and Wade Kerspuy vs. Josemar Octavio.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Sergio Martinez vs. Paul Williams II
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a WBC middleweight title bout between Sergio 'Maravilla' Martinez (45-2, 24 KOs) and Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (39-1, 27 KOs) from Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on November 20, 2010.

programme.title: World Karate Federation
programme.desc: The highest level of competition in the sport of karate anywhere in the world will take place from Budapest, Hungary, as the WKF SENIOR WORLD CHAMPIONSHIPS take place. The top competitors from across the globe, from six different continents, will all converge on Budapest to stake their claim as the best in the world. Don't miss the WKF SENIOR WORLD CHAMPIONSHIPS, only on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Gerry Penalosa vs. Jhonny Gonzalez
programme.desc: This episode features Jhonny Gonzalez defending his WBO bantamweight title against Gerry Penalosa, as well as kickboxing, sumo, weapons and more!

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Arturo Gatti vs. Alfonso Gomez
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Arturo Gatti facing off with Alfonso Gomez in what would be Gatti's final boxing match. Also on the card, Andre Berto takes on veteran Carlos Quintana on his way to stardom.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 1, from the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena in Tokyo, Japan, features Takakeisho, Tokushoryu, Kagayaki and Enho.

programme.title: Macho: The Hector Camacho Story
programme.desc: This series takes a hard-hitting look at the rise, fall and untimely death of one of boxing's most colorful champions. Hector Camacho's dynamic speed, footwork and power made him a fighter to be reckoned with, but it was his flamboyance and showmanship that ushered in a new era in boxing. The series chronicles his epic battles inside the ring, his struggles with addiction outside of it and the mystery of the double homicide that claimed his life.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Fights Hector Camacho vs. Heath Todd
programme.desc: FIGHT SPORTS revisits some of Hector Camacho's best fights from the legendary USA's Tuesday Night Fights series alongside our new documentary series Macho: The Hector Camacho Story. In this episode Hector "Macho" Camacho (61-3-1 29 KO) vs. Heath Todd (32-10-0 13 KO) in a 10-round Halbmittel contest from the War Memorial Auditorium in Ft. Lauderdale FL USA.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA JP Buys vs. Luthando Biko

programme.title: MEGA Fights Yuriorkis Gamboa vs. Marcos Ramirez
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features undefeated featherweights Yuriorkis Gamboa, 'El Cinclon de Guantanamo', (11-0, 9 KOs) and Marcos Ramirez (25-0, 16 KOs) from the Pechanga Resort and Casino in Temecula, California, USA, on October 4, 2008. The two young fighters had a quick ending street brawl that brought the crowd to its feet.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Floyd Mayweather Jr vs. Oscar De La Hoya
programme.desc: This episode features the WBC World super welterweight title between Floyd Mayweather, Jr. and Oscar De La Hoya that made $165 million in total gross revenue, making it the richest fight ever, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: Featuring Women's CMX Form and Weapons and Girl's Weapons at the ISKA US Open from Disney, Orlando, Florida, USA.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Shane Mosley vs. Floyd Mayweather, Jr.
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a heavily-anticipated welterweight bout featuring Floyd Mayweather, Jr. and "Sugar" Shane Mosley. The fight, which generated $78 million in revenue, was Mayweather's first title fight since his comeback from his first retirement. Also on the card, heavyweight Bermane Stiverne and two-weight world champ Marcos Maidana.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 2, from the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena in Tokyo, Japan, features Shohozan, Yutakayama, Endo and Okinoumi

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best Judo from the Zagreb Grand Prix, where some of the young Judo fans get the opportunity to train with former Olympic champion Mark Huizinga and triple world champion Illias Iliadis. Plus we watch as Judo's biggest star Teddy Riner competes in the +100 kg division.

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode is highlighted by a heartfelt interview with the legendary MMA Hall of Famer Tito Ortiz that shows you sides of the former champ you never knew from his childhood to his love of fishing to the man he is today. We stop by "Cowboy" Donald Cerrone's ranch to see you don't need the flashiest training equipment to be a world class fighter. Plus Nate Marquardt gets his dream car and UFC ring girls bring us on a tour of a new gym.

programme.title: FS MMA Tomasz Romanowski vs. Radoslaw Paczuski
programme.desc: This episode of FIGHT SPORTS MMA showcases action from KSW 78 in Szczecin, Poland, when Tomasz Romanowski meets Radoslaw Paczuski for the middleweight championship belt eliminator. Radoslaw Paczuski, who has a series of five consecutive victories, will face the biggest challenge in his MMA career against 'Tommy' who has won three of his last four fights by KO.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Floyd Mayweather Jr vs. Oscar De La Hoya
programme.desc: This episode features the WBC World super welterweight title between Floyd Mayweather, Jr. and Oscar De La Hoya that made $165 million in total gross revenue, making it the richest fight ever, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: Featuring Women's CMX Form and Weapons and Girl's Weapons at the ISKA US Open from Disney, Orlando, Florida, USA.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Shane Mosley vs. Floyd Mayweather, Jr.
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a heavily-anticipated welterweight bout featuring Floyd Mayweather, Jr. and "Sugar" Shane Mosley. The fight, which generated $78 million in revenue, was Mayweather's first title fight since his comeback from his first retirement. Also on the card, heavyweight Bermane Stiverne and two-weight world champ Marcos Maidana.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 2, from the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena in Tokyo, Japan, features Shohozan, Yutakayama, Endo and Okinoumi

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best Judo from the Zagreb Grand Prix, where some of the young Judo fans get the opportunity to train with former Olympic champion Mark Huizinga and triple world champion Illias Iliadis. Plus we watch as Judo's biggest star Teddy Riner competes in the +100 kg division.

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode is highlighted by a heartfelt interview with the legendary MMA Hall of Famer Tito Ortiz that shows you sides of the former champ you never knew from his childhood to his love of fishing to the man he is today. We stop by "Cowboy" Donald Cerrone's ranch to see you don't need the flashiest training equipment to be a world class fighter. Plus Nate Marquardt gets his dream car and UFC ring girls bring us on a tour of a new gym.

programme.title: FS MMA Tomasz Romanowski vs. Radoslaw Paczuski
programme.desc: This episode of FIGHT SPORTS MMA showcases action from KSW 78 in Szczecin, Poland, when Tomasz Romanowski meets Radoslaw Paczuski for the middleweight championship belt eliminator. Radoslaw Paczuski, who has a series of five consecutive victories, will face the biggest challenge in his MMA career against 'Tommy' who has won three of his last four fights by KO.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Sergio Gabriel Martinez vs. Serhiy Dzinziruk
programme.desc: This episode features a bout for the vacant WBC diamond middleweight title, as Sergio Gabriel 'Maravilla' Martinez (46-2, 25 KOs) takes on fellow southpaw Serhiy Dzinziruk, aka 'Dzyna Razor' (37-0. 24 KOs). This fight took place from Foxwoods Resort Casino in Mashantucket, Connecticut, USA, on March 12, 2011. Martinez was the reigning Fighter of the Year coming into the fight and vacated his WBC Middleweight title in order to fight the undefeated former champion Dzinziruk.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Po and Blade's personalities clash as they track Klaus and Veruca and fight off some of Po's old foes. Meanwhile, Klaus and Veruca continue on their path of destruction while looking for the mysterious "Lotus".

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Po's moral lines are blurred when he and Blade have to break an untrustworthy hedgehog monk (Zhen) out of jail to get more information on what Klaus and Veruca stole from the Lotus. They learn from Zhen that there are in fact three more weapons, and Po recognizes one of them from a comic book.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: The evil General Morando launches a coup on the alien planet Akiridion-5. In the ensuing battle, the planet's King and Queen are severely injured, and their surviving son Krel and daughter Aja escape the planet with military commander, Varvatos Vex. They seek refuge on a backwater planet: Earth.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Aja, Krel, and Vex explore Earth looking for technology to repair their ship. When the high school Principal demands to meet Aja and Krel's guardians, the Royal teens transform two maintenance robots (Blanks) to pose as their "human" parents.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: In an effort to blend in with their surroundings, Krel engineers a device to get into the "mind-set" of humans and ends up discovering far more than he expected. Meanwhile, General Morando's bounty hunters close in on the Royals.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 26
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes-why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 27
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 28
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. To get back to their normal size, they need to find the right ingredients to make a grow potion, which means going on an itty-bitty search through the dollhouse! For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 29

For the COTD, DJ Catnip shows us how to make a DJ Catnip purr-stick!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 30
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. When she takes it into The dollhouse each of the Gabby Cats sees something different in the doodle and turns it into a uniquely magical drawing. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 19
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Hare didn't hop. He was one of the speediest animals in Tinga Tinga but none of the other animals wanted to race with him because Hare always won and it was becoming boring. Then one day, slow but clever Tortoise decides to challenge Hare.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 20
programme.desc: You see there was time when Mosquito didn't buzz. Mosquito was as quiet as quiet can be… and did she like to tell tales. One day Mosquito tells the Monkeys that the sun looks very low in the sky. ‘Maybe it's sad and doesn't want to rise!' worry the Monkeys.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 1
programme.desc: Ted Glenn's Cornish cousin Ned is sending him a steam engine as an alternative means to power his workshop. Pat and Jess set off to Cornwall to collect this very large special delivery in the SDS Plane whilst Ted sets about giving away all of his old inventions to the people of Greendale in order to clear out enough space for the engine. Pat and Jess meet the eccentric Ned Glenn at his workshop and wrestle with the crate containing the heavy engine to get it aboard the plane.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 2
programme.desc: Pat has to deliver some pumpkins to Greendale School for the annual Halloween Pumpkin Party. But when he picks them up from Ted's workshop, Jess starts playing with a giant pumpkin and it rolls into the river and floats away. Pat follows it along the river and tries to fish it out with Alf's rod but the pumpkin is too heavy and the line breaks. As the party gets under way in Greendale, the giant pumpkin floats out to sea and Pat and Jess board the SDS Orca and head out into Pencaster Bay.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T. S1 - EP 13

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 5

Noddy decides to investigate who is turning the lights on. Bravely overcoming his own fear of the dark, he follows the clues to discover that the lights are being secretly turned on by a scared Carlton, who doesn't like the dark.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 6

It's up to Noddy to investigate and find out who is it that's leaving presents for all the friends. By following clues and using his investigation skills, Noddy follows the trail to Animal Acres and discovers that Pat Pat and the Pockets are the secret gift-givers.

Noddy uses all his skills of thinking, looking, listening and asking questions to find the home for the little duck.

programme.desc: Shashi sends Tony and Layla to steal weapons codes from a Russian oligarch, while Margaret "Echo" Pearl, Cisco and Frostee use Shashi’s absence to sneak into Shashi’s Cliffside mansion to investigate. Ms. Nowhere tells the team to look for the "keys" in Shashi’s mansion, but all they find are a couple of awesome super-cars.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Shashi stages a race up the privately-owned Mount Zebulon, and he invites Tony, Cisco, and Margaret "Echo" Pearl to participate. The crew soon discovers that Shashi is using the race to steal another super-car (this time from space!) - and he knows that Tony is working with the feds.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere tells the kids that the failed mission is over, but Tony isn’t ready to give up, and he’s determined to rescue Frostee. The crew goes rogue by deciding to steal the final key from Shashi and trade it for their friend.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 30
programme.desc: Stoick, Hiccup and Snotlout search for Spitelout when he goes missing, and ultimately find him on a distant island battling a fiery Singetail dragon.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 31
programme.desc: Astrid comes down with the Odin's Revenge flu and the Riders must search for the cure by finding a nearly extinct Buffalord dragon before Viggo does.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 32
programme.desc: The Riders head to a tropical island for fun in the sun, not realizing it's infested with Grimora Leeches which drives their dragons to turn on them.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S2 - EP 30
programme.desc: Blinky, Toby and Claire make a dangerous trade with the Janus Order while Gunmar sets Jim up in a battle to the death

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S2 - EP 31
programme.desc: When Gunmar discovers Jim’s friends are in the Darklands, it becomes a race against time as the Trollhunters and Gunmar try to escape

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S2 - EP 32
programme.desc: Eager to return to normal life, Jim struggles with re-adjusting as he leads the Trollhunting team to track down three Goblins that escaped the Darklands

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Po and Blade must convince a deceased comic book writer's son to give them information about an unreleased comic that may point them toward the next weapon: a whip of fire. However, after the events of 103 Po is now a wanted criminal, so the Emperor's Forbidden Company arrives and captures him. Torn between saving Po and the mission she's sworn to complete, Blade flees and abandons Po.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: A mysterious figure helps Po escape the guards, so Po makes his way to a desert market, determined to prove Blade wrong for leaving him behind. But when he accidentally stumbles into Klaus and Veruca, he and Blade awkwardly reunite while giving chase, and work through their differences. But the mysterious figure has followed Po and tries to capture them, clearly a new threat to our team.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: With a map from the comic book, Po and Blade make the treacherous journey through the desert to the lost city, and once inside they find the guardian of the fire whip, Rukhmini. The mysterious figure, a stag named Colin, forges an uneasy alliance with Klaus and Veruca.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: When an alien beetle infestation threatens to expose their true identities, the Royals must depend on a new ally for help. Meanwhile, Zadra joins Morando’s army as a double agent who secretly spies on him for the growing Resistance.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Aja and Krel's search for parts to repair the Mothership leads them to Driver's Ed -- and a high speed run-in with the Zeron Brotherhood. Meanwhile, Zadra begins spying on Morando's sinister plans.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Stuck in a time-loop, Aja finds unlikely help from Jim Lake and Team Trollhunters. Meanwhile, a giant Troll rampages the Arcadia High Science Fair, threatening to expose both the Troll world and Aja and Krel’s alien secret.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Tony races against Shashi and Layla through a Northern California ghost town, but Shashi and Layla are using the race as a cover for a heist on a billionaire’s train. Tony and his team are introduced to the other cool SH1FT3R racers, and while they can’t stop the heist without blowing their cover, they do manage to get a tracker on the train car Shashi and Layla stole.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Shashi sends Tony and Layla to steal weapons codes from a Russian oligarch, while Margaret "Echo" Pearl, Cisco and Frostee use Shashi’s absence to sneak into Shashi’s Cliffside mansion to investigate. Ms. Nowhere tells the team to look for the "keys" in Shashi’s mansion, but all they find are a couple of awesome super-cars.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Shashi stages a race up the privately-owned Mount Zebulon, and he invites Tony, Cisco, and Margaret "Echo" Pearl to participate. The crew soon discovers that Shashi is using the race to steal another super-car (this time from space!) - and he knows that Tony is working with the feds.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 21
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Rhino didn't charge and he couldn't see very well at all. Poor old Rhino really wanted to be invited to the Dance of the Horns up on the plains with Buffalo and all the other horned animals. But Rhino didn't have a horn, so he wasn't allowed. The Monkeys decide to help Rhino and make him a horn from a piece of old wood. But when Rhino wakes up he doesn't know what it is. ‘Aargh! Thing on the end of my nose! CHAAaarge!' And that's Why Rhino Charges.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 22
programme.desc: You see Caterpillar was never in a hurry. When all the animals were racing around Tinga Tinga getting ready for the Best-dressed parade, Caterpillar was happy to sit in a tree and munch on leaves saying ‘Po-le, po-le, slowly, slowly, good things come to those who wait'. Then one day the rains come and Caterpillar disappears into a cocoon. ‘What's happening?' questions Elephant. ‘Wait and see' says Tortoise wisely ‘Wait and See'.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 3
programme.desc: Julian is very excited about the Sealife Awareness Day at Greendale School. While he's talking to Pat about it, his dad gets a call from Ben - a special delivery! Pat discovers it's a giant inflatable shark which is to be the surprise centrepiece of the Sealife day. But when Pat stops to help Alf mend a gate, a mix-up with parcel tape ends up with the whale accidentally inflating and floating off...

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 4
programme.desc: Pat must deliver Ben to Greendale School, dressed as superhero, The Blue Flash. But Ben keeps stopping to help people on the way and his costume gets increasingly ruined! Meanwhile at the school, Julian can't wait to meet his hero but Sarah Gilbertson insists that The Blue Flash isn't real... At last Pat arrives at the school with Ben wearing a new costume hastily cobbled together by Pat. Julian isn't fooled. Looks like The Blue Flash isn't real after all...

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: After winning a citizen swap contest, Archibald moves to a mountain town for a week. Archibald finds a practical use for his pal's wacky invention.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: Crackridge's new resident dinosaur has a hard time fitting in. Archibald and a new friend attempt to conquer their fear of the basement.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: Smartysaurus is upset because her best friend, Deltoid, keeps calling her a monster and running away from her. Noddy decides to investigate and find out why Deltoid's behaving so strangely. He soon discovers that Deltoid has lost all his memories and doesn't recognise any of his friends anymore.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: Pat-Pat is meant to be giving a baton twirling display at the Town Hall but the stage is covered with sticky stuff. Clockwork Mouse and Carlton can clear up the sticky stuff but Noddy must investigate to find out who was trying to spoil Pat-Pat's show or they might do it again! Using his wwwbook to follow all the clues from polishing day at the Fairy Castle to Fairy Coco swapping the polish for a ribbon, Noddy works out it was Pat-Pat who tried to delay her show.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: Fuse is heartbroken when his new special toy wash is broken. Right before Revs could have a wash in it too! Noddy decides to investigate and help the little robot find out who has broken it. Using all his investigating skills and collecting evidence with the WhoWhatWhere Tablet Noddy realises that it's his own best beloved car, Revs, who broke the toy wash! Poor Revs thought that if he went through the toy wash he'd miss his special time with Noddy and Bumpy.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: Everyone in Fable Fields is very worried that a new Dazzle Dragon has appeared in the land. Big Ears says there's no such thing as a Dragon in Toyland so Noddy decides to investigate.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 30
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. When she takes it into The dollhouse each of the Gabby Cats sees something different in the doodle and turns it into a uniquely magical drawing. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 31
programme.desc: It's time for a safari adventure in the dollhouse! For the COTD segment, Cakey and Parrot show us how to make adorable safari snacks.

programme.desc: The Rescue Riders get stuck in a cave with their rival, Magnus, during a race to find a new source of an important mineral.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Frustrated that she's not fitting in with the team, Aggro goes off on her own with Elbone on a mission to save a dragon egg trapped in ice.

programme.desc: Cruz decides to turn the sunken ship into a park. But all his and Kelp’s "fun-crastinating" puts the project in jeopardy. / Kelp accidentally knocks a boulder into the stream, blocking the flow while trying his unicorn spark. Frustrated by magic, Kelp uses the narwhal way.

programme.title: Go Dog Go! S2 - EP 31
programme.desc: One of Tag’s biggest dreams is to be a contestant on her favorite TV game show: The Pawmazing Race, hosted by Kelly Korgi. programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.desc: There's a mystery in the dollhouse! When things start to mysteriously disappear around the dollhouse, Gabby and Pandy play detectives, using all their senses to find clues, follow them, and solve the mystery. For our COTD segment, CatRat and Baby Me-Owls show us how to make ice cube paints!

programme.desc: Shashi finally reveals his master plan.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: The kids battle Shashi in Las Vegas as Shashi tries to take down evil billionaire Cleve and use Skeleton Key to create a new world order. Frostee has a plan to get Skeleton Key offline, but it only gives Tony ten seconds to take Shashi out and save the world.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: Tony and his crew have been working as spy racers in LA for a while now and are itching to go international. Whey they discover a mysterious man with a strange tattoo of a formula in a smuggling ring bust, Ms. Nowhere finally agrees to let them go to Rio to investigate the tattoo and the whereabouts of one of her agents who has gone dark - Layla Gray.

programme.desc: After Steve discovers "monsters" could be lurking under Arcadia, he allies with Eli to investigate

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 8

programme.desc: After a woman's body is found in a neighbourhood dumpster, investigators narrow down their suspect list to three people, but will they be able to convince the men to break their brotherly bond?

programme.title: City Confidential (S8) - EP 11
programme.desc: Murders are rare in tranquil Delta Township. So when a well-liked couple is gunned down in their home, residents are terrified - until police discover the monster accidentally left a trail of breadcrumbs.

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6) - EP 6
programme.desc: Kim Edwards and Lucas Markham were both outsiders from troubled homes. They felt they understood each other when no one else did. Together they made a plan to get rid of the mum and sister Kim resented.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks - EP 4
programme.desc: When jewellery seller Minerva Cantu, 26, is found bound, gagged and lifeless in her home, police suspect robbery as the motive.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: A suspect flees from a high-speed car chase while carrying her infant child. State troopers catch a man with a stolen utility pole strapped to the roof of his car.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country. A man streaks across a golf course, delaying a tournament. A dead fish is eerily placed on the front porch of a house; and more.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape - EP 7
programme.desc: One FBI undercover agent meets with suspects in Denmark in an effort to retrieve one of the world's lost treasures; another agent takes on an unlikely suspect believed to be planning a murder for hire.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: First-timers and frequent flyers get booked, including the son of a deputy who is charged with stealing a dog, and an intoxicated gentleman comes back to see his favourite policeman.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2) - EP 13
programme.desc: Social media influencer Alexis Murphy was on her way to a hair appointment, but never arrived. When a photo of her abandoned car was posted online, her worried loved-ones knew something was terribly wrong.

programme.title: Murder In The 21st - EP 3
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old struggling to make it on her own goes missing, her family kicks into high gear to find her.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks - EP 2
programme.desc: When the blood-smeared car of 27-year-old Stefanie Watson is found in a Maryland parking lot, her family holds out hope she's still alive.

programme.title: Court Cam (S6) - EP 149
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. An angry defendant flips off the judge during a virtual hearing; a victim is cross-examined by her accused attacker; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S6) - EP 150
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. An accused stalker screams expletives at the judge; a shooting victim's mother cries for justice; an assistant prosecutor argues with the judge; and more.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S15) - EP 105
programme.desc: In Mobile, a professor is murdered in his own home. It takes a missing gaming console and a strategic game of cat and mouse with the suspects for detectives and prosecutors to get justice.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26) - EP 531
programme.desc: In Mobile, two men are killed after their car is sprayed with bullets on the highway, leading detectives across the country in search of answers.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S16) - EP 115
programme.desc: In Tulsa, there's little evidence and no clear motive after a beloved 24-year-old is gunned down in the backseat of a car. It's up to his friends to help detectives and prosecutors deliver justice.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S15) - EP 99
programme.desc: After a man is gunned down at an after-hours club, investigators and the prosecutor are left with no witnesses willing to provide testimony, leaving the case hanging on the defendant's self-defence claim.

programme.title: Beyond The Headlines: The Series - EP 2
programme.desc: Stories of mothers and fathers who made headlines by committing crimes out of malice, extremism, and desperation.

programme.title: Portrait Artist Of The Year S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: In the final heat, nine artists from across Australia have just four hours to create portraits of Muster Dogs Season 1 winner Frank Finger and his dog Annie, actor Chloe Hayden and comedian Alex Lee.

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent (2026) - EP 6
programme.desc: Ireland isn't known for being one of the world's hottest surfing destinations. But in winter surfers head to the village of Mullaghmore, braving the freezing North Atlantic to take on waves as big as multi-storey buildings.

programme.title: Planet America (2026) - EP 10
programme.desc: Donald Trump reiterates a 2-3 week timeline to wind up the war in Iran during a primetime address and claims Iran's navy has been "absolutely destroyed". Trump also told allies "go get your own oil" from the Strait of Hormuz.

programme.title: Roads Unknown India S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Jess and her riders face challenges heading to Kodaikanal, riding through rough terrain and making decisions on the fly. The gang is rewarded with an elephant sighting and a new addition to their ride crew in Munnar.

programme.title: Movin' To The Country S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Craig kicks things off in Orbost, in a remarkable brewery run by a young couple who make revolutionary beer by linking up with local farmers and foragers, under the wise guidance of Indigenous writer and teacher Bruce Pascoe.

programme.title: The World (2026) - EP 53
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: News Breakfast (2026) - EP 69
programme.desc: Start your day with all the news you need to stay informed. Emma Rebellato and Catherine Murphy bring you the latest news, interviews and the day's top stories, joined by Charles Brice with sport and Nate Byrne with weather.

programme.title: News Breakfast (2026) - EP 69
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: ABC News Mornings (2026) - EP 69
programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's happening this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Gemma Veness.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon (2026) - EP 69
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: Australian Story (2026) - EP 8
programme.desc: In the 1960s and 70s, Mal Leyland was one of the best-known people on TV, as one half of the Leyland Brothers. Now at age 81, the pioneer of outback documentaries is suffering dementia - but still planning one last trip.

programme.title: Great Australian Walks S2 - EP 3
programme.desc: Susie Youssef goes back in time while exploring Ned Kelly country in northern Victoria, where she walks in the footsteps of the Kelly gang and explores the goldfields where miners hoped to strike it rich.

programme.title: Roads Unknown India S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Jess sets off for Palakkad, exporing the region's lush tea plantations and local tribal villages. As the crew heads into Karnataka, they visit a stunning waterfall and gain more riders along the way.

programme.title: Gardening Australia S37 - EP 7
programme.desc: Sophie explores a cooling cottage garden, Josh visits a bushfood expert's accessible backyard, Guest Presenter Thanh the Fruit Nerd delves into custard apples, and we meet a plant scientist creating beautiful city landscapes.

programme.title: Landline (2026) - EP 7
programme.desc: Growing pains for the nation's booming berry industry; and the determined teenager pushing on with his dream of a career in agriculture.

programme.title: Planet America (2026) - EP 10
programme.desc: Donald Trump reiterates a 2-3 week timeline to wind up the war in Iran during a primetime address and claims Iran's navy has been "absolutely destroyed". Trump also told allies "go get your own oil" from the Strait of Hormuz.

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien (2026) - EP 69
programme.desc: Jade Macmillan brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: A Bite To Eat With Alice S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Aussie food icon, Stephanie Alexander is in the kitchen to show off her mum's famous rabbit pie.

programme.title: Muster Dogs: Where Are They Now S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Lisa Millar embarks on a nationwide journey to reconnect with the outstanding dogs and their dedicated owners featured in series 1 and 2 of Muster Dogs.

programme.title: ABC National News (2026) - EP 97
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you the day's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Jade Macmillan.

programme.desc: An American exchange student in Paris falls in love with her host family's handsome son. But when she witnesses a murder, it sets off a chain of events that will change the young couple's lives forever.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1) - EP 15
programme.desc: Denise has a growth on her booty, but scarring from a previous trauma has kept her from getting it removed. Zachary is a drag artist whose touring career is dragged down by his debilitating psoriasis.

programme.title: Hit-and-Miss Tour (S1) - EP 6

programme.title: Legends Of The Fork - EP 19

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s "The Exchange" is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.
