programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Scientists are developing powerful magnets to enable clean energy sources like fusion. But China's dominance of the supply chain for rare-earth magnets threatens their global availability.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: We explore the world of biocomputing-where scientists are laying the foundation for a field that may blur the lines between the biological and synthetic.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Geothermal has been the underdog of the energy industry - but that may be about to change as new startups use fracking technologies to expand potential geothermal sites.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Scientists and entrepreneurs are testing radical ideas like solar radiation management and ocean fertilisation - and finding funding for it.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Flying cars have largely remained science fiction, until now. A new generation of electrified aircraft is attracting the attention of investors and venture capitalists around the world.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Governments and entrepreneurs are racing to commercialize the moon. These efforts could unlock a new, deep-space economy. But to return and stay will require the highest levels of innovation.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang S5 - EP 1
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets California’s First Couple, Governor Gavin Newsom and Jennifer Siebel Newsom, visiting their home in Marin County and offices in Sacramento to see how they work together.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang S4 - EP 2
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Snap CEO Evan Spiegel in Los Angeles for a conversation about his entrepreneurial journey, building Snap and his latest consumer hardware bet.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang S4 - EP 3
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Alexis Ohanian at Athlos NYC, an annual women's track and field event. They discuss his athletics portfolio, venture career and what really happened when he left Reddit.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang S4 - EP 4
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Reese Witherspoon and the Hello Sunshine executive team to discuss the company's founding mission and what's next for Hollywood.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang S4 - EP 5
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Disney Entertainment Co-Chair Dana Walden and a cast of Disney stars for an inside look at the entertainment giant's global streaming and TV operations.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang S3 - EP 1
programme.desc: Emily goes inside Stargate, an historic $500 billion bet on the future of AI. She speaks with OpenAI CEO Sam Altman & Softbank CEO Masayoshi Son about their hopes for the project.

programme.title: The Circuit with Emily Chang S3 - EP 2
programme.desc: Emily goes inside Stargate, an historic $500 billion bet on the future of AI. She speaks with OpenAI CEO Sam Altman & Softbank CEO Masayoshi Son about their hopes for the project.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Liquid Death was founded on the idea of breaking the norms of traditional marketing. We speak to CMO Dan Murphy about the water company's origin as a "sheep in wolf's clothing."

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: We speak with Pranav Yadav, CEO of Neuro-Insight, about the marketing intelligence his company is gleaning from neuroscience.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Lisa McKnight, Mattel's chief brand officer, has been at the forefront of reviving the iconic Barbie. Now the famous toy brand has launched itself beyond store shelves and onto the silver screen.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: McLaren Racing CEO Zak Brown discusses the technology, data and effort required to propel the McLaren brand onto the modern F1 stage and into living rooms around the globe.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Stephan Pretorious, chief technology officer of WPP, unpacks the world of generative artificial intelligence and its potential impact, both positive and negative, on marketing.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: From immersive experiences to live streaming, National Women's Soccer League Chief Marketing and Commercial Officer Julie Haddon discusses the opportunities for growing women's professional sports.

programme.title: How Chinese Brands Are Going Global
programme.desc: From Pop Mart's Labubus to Shein, Temu and Luckin, Chinese brands have become global consumer favorites and cultural ambassadors. With much of the credit going to TikTok, shoppers are hungry for more.

programme.title: Tesla's Dangerous Doors
programme.desc: A number of fatal car crashes involving Tesla vehicles has prompted increased scrutiny of its electric doors, triggering lawsuits over whether the design can leave passengers trapped.

programme.title: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
programme.desc: The sinking of the Gulf Livestock 1 was the worst disaster in the history of the live-export trade, an industry made up of about 150 ships with a market value totaling $20 billion to $30 billion.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Francine visits Finland, where the threat from Russia looms large. She speaks to President Alexander Stubb about Finnish resilience and how his country is preparing for an uncertain future.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua meets Ray Dalio on OceanX in the port of Nice for the UN Ocean Conference. They speak about radical transparency, building and leaving one of the largest hedge funds and what's next.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua talks with Franklin Templeton CEO Jenny Johnson about how to steer a $1.6 trillion business amid the rise of AI, shifting politics and booming private markets.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Former UK Prime Minister Theresa May speaks with Francine Lacqua about Vladimir Putin, and her approach to leadership in a world seeing a rise in "strongmen."

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Bloomberg's award-winning anchor sits down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.desc: This is the story of how an Arizona woman's house became a gateway for North Korea's IT operatives - an underground "laptop farm" that infiltrated US companies and pumped millions to the regime.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Hannah Fry reveals why ancient Greece was the birthplace of so many big ideas. She decodes the Parthenon's geometry, sails the Aegean with ancient tools and is swept up in a riotous festival.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Hannah Fry journeys to Ireland, her ancestral homeland, tracing the impact of the nation's modern economic transformation and its connections to the land and sea.

programme.desc: Hannah Fry reveals how Iceland's geological extremes help shape its culture. She meets scientists predicting lava flows and harnessing geothermal power, and even rides along ancient Viking trails.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 5

programme.desc: Hannah Fry travels to Spain to decode its history and culture. She learns about the rhythms of flamenco, a mountain whistle language and the hidden symbolism in its urban planning.

It explores the country’s business, politics, technology, culture, entertainment and more. China 24 tackles head-on the issues that matter most to the nation and its people, with topical reports highlighting challenges facing this fast-changing country.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The Point with Liu Xin
programme.desc: The Point with LIU Xin is a current affairs program on CGTN. The program comments on global news through LIU Xin’s very own unique perspective. With two decades of experience as a news anchor and overseas correspondent, LIU Xin has an engaging and personal style. The Point with LIU Xin connects world audience through social media, enhancing their participation as well as offering a comprehensive perspective on world events.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Every Monday to Friday, it provides nutrition to form your own thoughts and ideas through live debate and interviews. Live debates linking movers and shakers take place in the signature segment "Global Debate".

programme.title: The World Today

programme.title: French in a Happy Mood
programme.desc: Let’s learn simple and easy-to-remember phrases, looking at a modern Europe that cherishes its history and traditions while pursuing a lifestyle that fits its stature. Furthermore, we explore tips for "happiness" and various forms of "joy" through the unique European way of thinking and values behind their languages and lifestyles.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Scent of the Wind" Ep. 6 (R)
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Girl Power - EP 674
programme.desc: Invite stylish men from all over the world to share cultural differences, feelings and values, and life experiences with Taiwanese!

programme.title: Hello Doctor - EP 1770
programme.desc: The program invites doctors from different fields to talk about big and small things about doctors, break the stereotype of doctors and provide audiences with information on medical health from a relaxed and pleasant perspective!

programme.title: Wassup Man! Let's Chill! Let' Go Play! - EP 17
programme.desc: A trip without a purpose, just go on a whim, so simple, are you willing to join us? A journey that witnesses the friendship of men begins!Let's go! Bring a simple bag, ride a hot-blooded motorcycle, and have fun traveling and charging.

programme.title: Dee Girls Talk - EP 473
programme.desc: Hosted by Dee Hsu, the most queenly artist in the entertainment industry, and partnered with the humorous assistant host Patrick, each episode invites many of the most popular and topical artists and Internet celebrities to appear on the show. Through Dee Hsu Her profound and spicy hosting skills stirred up unparalleled "laughter" with the guests.

programme.title: No.57 Dream Boulevard - Reserve Your Dreams - EP 1936
programme.desc: More professional, richer, and more diversified car model information is shared with the audience.

programme.title: Have Fun Together - EP 1
programme.desc: A star-studded, cross-generational travel reality show that documents the unforgettable friendship journey of artists from different generations!

programme.title: All Star Quiz Show - EP 56
programme.desc: The puzzle reality program, with the curator Sam Tseng as the knowledge gatekeeper, tests every artist star who comes to challenge the Jiugongge puzzle game. If you want to conquer the Jiugongge level, through creative association, logical reasoning, and rational analysis, you will have the opportunity to obtain wisdom stars and take away the dream prize.

"Headline Talk Show" is the most daring-speak-out TV show. We speak out your voice!

programme.title: Big Boys Club
programme.desc: Each episode of Big Boys Club invites singers, artistes as well as people from different walks of life as guests onto the show, participating in relaxed interviews and discussing current trends.

programme.title: Forever Young At Heart - EP 9
programme.desc: High school is the most youthful and passionate time of everyone's life, but it can also be the most confusing period. This drama centres around the youthfulness, love and relationships of school life.

programme.title: Themis & What's On Today - EP 6
programme.desc: High Court judge Yan Huizhi investigates a case involving a 14-year-old boy linked to a child's death. Discovering that he had repeatedly offended without punishment due to his age, she demotes herself to the juvenile court to help reform troubled youths.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2779
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.title: Scoop 2026
programme.desc: This programme goes hot on the heels of the biggest happenings in society and the entertainment scene, bringing you the latest scoops.

programme.title: Journey To The Wealthy West
programme.desc: Hosts Liu Chenzhi and Zheng Yanfeng embark on a luxurious journey, visiting guests in the United States. They explore little-known stories of former NBA players, entrepreneurs, designers, wealthy women, artists and collectors, understanding their definitions of success.

programme.title: Romance of A Twin Flower - EP 10
programme.desc: Ji Man loses her memory after a fall and awakens as the hated wife of Minister Ning Yuxuan, but turns her fate around through wit, helping him win imperial favour. Together they defeat powerful enemies and overcome political plots, finally finding love amid hardship.

programme.title: Happy Old Buddies
programme.desc: This show brings on doctors and Chinese medicine practitioners to discuss diseases that the elderly should pay attention to, and provide prevention and treatment methods.

programme.desc: News Treasury takes everyone to uncover news from the treasure house. In addition to past specials, live broadcasts and reports, there are also precious clips from iconic events that have never been exposed.

programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.desc: Oh Woori (Im Soo Hyang) vowed to remain a virgin until she marries, and has shied away from romantic relationships in a bid to remain chaste. A terrible mixup takes place during her routine checkup and she is accidentally artificially inseminated!

programme.title: Good Partner - EP 12
programme.desc: The story follows popular divorce lawyer Cha Eun-Kyung (Jang Na-ra), who finds herself faced with her own marital crisis. She often clashes with rookie lawyer Han Yoo-Ri (Nam Ji-Hyun) over cases. A workplace battle between the two lawyers is about to unfold.

programme.title: Fight For Love - EP 28
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Falsely accused noblewoman Chu Yu (Victoria Song) teams up with Wei Yun (Ding Yuxi) to uncover a military massacre’s truth; amid war and palace intrigue, they fall in love while defending their homeland.

programme.title: No Return - EP 15
programme.desc: Kwai-sim’s love confession is a failure. Shap-chat then feels ashamed towards Kwai-sim. And he is not sure what he wants. Kwai-sim is also absent-minded all day long and feels increasingly inferior. Ning Lei claims she is again harassed by Tai-fu. Wai Ho manages to get even. Ning Lei also makes a love confession to Wai Ho.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 857
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: When a Man Loves a Woman - EP 1
programme.desc: Man (Kwok Tsun On), Fai (Ng Chun Yu), Wah (Esther Kwan) and Shan (Fennie Yuen) grew up together and were very good friends. Man, Fai and Shan even shared an apartment. Fai was a playboy. He liked fooling around without any commitment. Man, on the other hand, was very loyal to his girlfriend - Wah._x000D__x000D_Man and Fai treated Shan as their brothers since she acted like a tom-boy. However, Shan was in love with Fai.

programme.title: Can't Buy Me Love - EP 11
programme.desc: Reluctant to marry into the Tibetan royal family, the willful Princess CHIU YEUNG (Charmaine Sheh) has to find herself a husband as soon as possible. Owner of a gold store TING LOI-HEI (Kwan Kuk Ying) recommends her second and third sons, KAM DOR-LUK (Moses Chan) and KAM DOR-SHAU (Wong Ho Yin) to the Princess, hoping that the royal marriage would bring them out of financial crisis and save their family business somehow.

programme.title: Unchained Medleyr - EP 16
programme.desc: Pop musician Ding Yat-chun (Owen Cheung) is often troubled by nightmares. He then gets embroiled in a plagiarism scandal, so he moves to a small village for the time being as he also wants to relax. Yat-chun unwittingly opens an old Cantonese opera costume trunk in the village house, releasing the ghost of opera diva Wan Lau-fong (Katy Kung). In the 1990s, Lau-fong was a Cantonese opera diva, but she passed away due to some accident. Lau-fong has forgotten almost everything about her human life.

programme.title: Succession War - EP 2
programme.desc: HESHEN (Ruco Chan) supports PRINCE YONGYAN (Shaun Tam) to accede to the throne. Following QIANLONG’s death, EMPEROR JIAQING manages to convince HESHEN’s son FENGSHEN-YINDE (Matthew Ho) and confidant FUCHANG’AN (Joel Chan) to turn their coat, seeking to sweepingly eliminate HESHEN and his cronies. But, HESHEN comes prepared.

programme.title: Food Of Love - EP 12
programme.desc: Gifted cooking talent Tak (Wong Hei) wants to be a successful chef. He does not give up even when his father Kin (Leung Ka Yan) is against the idea. His uncle Kwai (Lau Kar Fai) is on his side and finally Tak is given a chance to learn in a Chinese restaurant in a hotel. There he meets his dream girl Wing (Kennix Kwok) and wins her heart. Tak’s best friend Lam (Fennie Yuen) is upset when she learns about this.

programme.title: Food Of Love - EP 13

programme.title: When a Man Loves a Woman - EP 3
programme.desc: Man (Kwok Tsun On), Fai (Ng Chun Yu), Wah (Esther Kwan) and Shan (Fennie Yuen) grew up together and were very good friends. Man, Fai and Shan even shared an apartment. Fai was a playboy. He liked fooling around without any commitment. Man, on the other hand, was very loyal to his girlfriend - Wah._x000D__x000D_Man and Fai treated Shan as their brothers since she acted like a tom-boy. However, Shan was in love with Fai.

programme.title: Can't Buy Me Love - EP 13
programme.desc: Reluctant to marry into the Tibetan royal family, the willful Princess CHIU YEUNG (Charmaine Sheh) has to find herself a husband as soon as possible. Owner of a gold store TING LOI-HEI (Kwan Kuk Ying) recommends her second and third sons, KAM DOR-LUK (Moses Chan) and KAM DOR-SHAU (Wong Ho Yin) to the Princess, hoping that the royal marriage would bring them out of financial crisis and save their family business somehow.

programme.title: Unchained Medleyr - EP 18
programme.desc: Pop musician Ding Yat-chun (Owen Cheung) is often troubled by nightmares. He then gets embroiled in a plagiarism scandal, so he moves to a small village for the time being as he also wants to relax. Yat-chun unwittingly opens an old Cantonese opera costume trunk in the village house, releasing the ghost of opera diva Wan Lau-fong (Katy Kung). In the 1990s, Lau-fong was a Cantonese opera diva, but she passed away due to some accident. Lau-fong has forgotten almost everything about her human life.

programme.title: Succession War - EP 4
programme.desc: HESHEN (Ruco Chan) supports PRINCE YONGYAN (Shaun Tam) to accede to the throne. Following QIANLONG’s death, EMPEROR JIAQING manages to convince HESHEN’s son FENGSHEN-YINDE (Matthew Ho) and confidant FUCHANG’AN (Joel Chan) to turn their coat, seeking to sweepingly eliminate HESHEN and his cronies. But, HESHEN comes prepared.

programme.title: Food Of Love - EP 16
programme.desc: Gifted cooking talent Tak (Wong Hei) wants to be a successful chef. He does not give up even when his father Kin (Leung Ka Yan) is against the idea. His uncle Kwai (Lau Kar Fai) is on his side and finally Tak is given a chance to learn in a Chinese restaurant in a hotel. There he meets his dream girl Wing (Kennix Kwok) and wins her heart. Tak’s best friend Lam (Fennie Yuen) is upset when she learns about this.

programme.title: Food Of Love - EP 17
programme.desc: Gifted cooking talent Tak (Wong Hei) wants to be a successful chef. He does not give up even when his father Kin (Leung Ka Yan) is against the idea. His uncle Kwai (Lau Kar Fai) is on his side and finally Tak is given a chance to learn in a Chinese restaurant in a hotel. There he meets his dream girl Wing (Kennix Kwok) and wins her heart. Tak’s best friend Lam (Fennie Yuen) is upset when she learns about this.

programme.title: Women
programme.desc: Bo Yi's husband is having an affair, so Bo Yi divorces him and joins the "Happy Spinsters Club" set up by her friends. However, she soon finds out that she does not enjoy being single and while sorting out her thoughts, her repentant husband begs her forgiveness. She must now decide on what she truly wants.

programme.title: Royal Tramp
programme.desc: Wei Xiao Bao is sent by a revolutionary group to be a spy in the imperial palace and find "The Sutra of 42 Chapters". Xiao Bao soon befriends Emperor Kang Xi but must carry out his mission at the same time, so he is caught between two camps.

programme.title: The Grey Men
programme.desc: Hong Kong police officer Ah Shan goes undercover in prison to gain the trust of criminal Tian, in order to seek evidence against his gang. After their release from jail, Shan helps Tian rise within the gang and become the new boss. However, just as Shan successfully cracks down on the gang, he uncovers a shocking secret about Tian...

programme.title: Painted Face
programme.desc: Scholar Wang Huai Qing sells paintings to save his ailing wife. He is attacked by a bird demon along the way but is rescued by Fox demon Xiao Rong. To elude the pursuit, Wang brings Xiao Rong home, sparking a love triangle and at the same time, unfolding an impending love between human and demon.

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Uncle Hua is a retired agent who owns an antique shop on an old street. When the old street is forcibly demolished by the local Green Dragon Gang one day, Uncle Hua's hidden identity is accidentally revealed, and he is pursued by a mysterious organization headed by Ah Jie. A fatal duel has just begun!

programme.title: Cop Shop Babes
programme.desc: Island East Police Station headed by Madam Lui is known for its "Cop Shop Babes" as all the officers there are female. Two police officers, Beer and Satay, apply for an internal transfer to this station in order to approach the girls. It is at this time that the police receives a bomb threat - can they resolve the case?

programme.title: Jealousy
programme.desc: Model Min is admitted to a hospital, but mysteriously falls to her death at night. Rumour has it that the hospital is haunted. Subsequently, Min's photographer begins receiving eerie phone calls, the writer loses consciousness in a bizarre car accident, and her friend mysteriously disappears...

programme.title: Forbidden City Cop
programme.desc: A wild and hilariously anachronistic tale of an imperial guard of the Forbidden City who has no martial arts abilities. When the emperor is abducted, he saved the day with his unusual hobby: tinkering with futuristic inventions!

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman
programme.desc: An epic historic adventure set during the turbulent times of the Three Kingdoms. Cao Cao attempts to enlist Guan Yu into his forces, but Guan is loyal to his sworn brother Liu Bei, who is also Cao's enemy. As Guan tries to rescue Liu Bei's concubine from Cao, he is forced to fight his way through. Can he succeed in the end?

programme.title: How to Choose a Royal Bride
programme.desc: The Empress Dowager has arranged for a Minister's daughter Qiong Yao, to become Emperor Kangxi's concubine. However, Qiong Yao escapes in pursuit of freedom in marriage and Kangxi is happy to not go through with the union. When Kangxi travels incognito to Jiangnan, he serendipitously encounters Qiong Yao, who disguises herself as a man...

programme.title: Cruel War
programme.desc: To combat the greenhouse effect, scientist Yan Xin attempts to plant newly developed super rubber seeds on a remote island, hoping to transform it into a thriving new land. Yan Xin's ex-husband decides to accompany her on this perilous journey. As conflicts arise, they encounter the local drug cartel, and a fatal battle is about to begin.

programme.title: The Mad Monk
programme.desc: Stephen Chow plays an arrogant god in Heaven who is being punished for his pranks and mistakes. He is sent to Earth and reincarnate as Mad Monk to change the destiny of three misguided souls - a prostitute, a beggar and a villain. The Mad Monk needs to complete the task in three days in order to return to Heaven.

programme.title: The Grandmaster
programme.desc: Directed by the acclaimed filmmaker Wong Kar Wai, this epic action feature begins in Foshan when Ip Man, the martial arts master from the south, takes up a challenge by ageing northern master Gong Yu Tian. Ip Man wins the fight, but is then defeated by Gong Yu Tian's daughter Gong Er, with whom he forms an emotional bond...

programme.title: Mother VS Mother
programme.desc: Guan De Xing fell in love with Li Xiao Yun when he was young, but was opposed by his mother and had to marry Zhou Shen Yu. Since then, Li holds a grudge against Zhou. Unfortunately, the son of Guan and Zhou falls in love with Li's daughter, and as the two mothers meet, they start brawling again!

programme.title: Detrimental
programme.desc: You Ji Ren is a blind man who works at a factory in an outlying island. When the factory is cut off from the outside world by a hurricane one day, a monster appears and turns whoever sees it into black shadows. As You cannot see the monster, he is able to help other coworkers leave safely and fight to kill the monster!

programme.title: Fight Back to School
programme.desc: SDU officer Chow Sing Sing goes undercover at a school to locate a missing gun. With his partner Tat, he successfully recovers the weapon, only to stumble upon a munitions smuggling ring. In retaliation, the smugglers storm the school and take students hostage, forcing Sing to risk everything to save them.

programme.title: The Case of Disappearances
programme.desc: In Misty Village, the adopted son Wen Jie is haunted by a recurring nightmare. He delves into a series of disappearance cases in the village to seek his true identity. As more villagers die mysteriously, belief in the curse of Emperor Jing Lung intensifies. Wen Jie teams up with the security chief to unveil the conspiracy and protect the villagers.

programme.title: Nezha
programme.desc: A former top team racing driver wants to prove himself in a race but accidentally hurts his teammate Lily, leading to the team's downfall. When an inexperienced virtual car racing champion joins the team and unexpectedly shines in a real-life race, can the three drivers team up to regain glory for their team?

programme.title: The Sorcerer & The White Snake
programme.desc: In this action fantasy movie based on the Chinese legend of the White Snake, a young herbalist falls in love with a thousand-year-old white snake disguised as a woman. When the white snake's true identity is revealed, a sorcerer goes to battle believing that in doing so, he is restoring balance and order between man and the supernatural.

programme.title: Legend Of The Fist- The Return Of Chen Zhen
programme.desc: In 1920s Shanghai, Chen Zhen goes undercover as a businessman to expose a mob boss's collaboration with the Japanese. While gaining his trust, he must also combat a wave of assassins sent by a brutal Japanese general. Fighting from the shadows in a black mask, he allies with a police captain to protect the city's patriots with his formidable fists.

programme.title: A Man Called Hero
programme.desc: In 1913, a brutal massacre forces Hua into exile in America. Reunited with his pregnant wife, tragedy strikes again when their home burns down on the night she gives birth to twins, killing her while their daughter gets kidnapped. Sixteen years later, as his son finds him, Hua confronts his ultimate nemesis in a climactic duel on top of the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Get in the Dark
programme.desc: A reporter hears three horror stories when investigating a case of the paper doll spirit 20 years ago. Miss Qiao had died in vain then, and her butler paid a paper craftsman to make a paper doll to be buried with her. Miss Qiao's spirit is revived to take revenge when the doll's eyes are drawn, and a series of horrible events begins to happen...

programme.title: Casino Tycoon
programme.desc: Inspired by the story of Macau's Casino King Stanley Ho, the movie traces his blood-splattered fight to the top from 1930s to 1960s. In 1941, a young graduate, Benny Ho, flees Hong Kong during the Japanese invasion and heads for Macau. Benny starts as a labourer but rises to the top of the city's casino business with his courage, wisdom and diligence.

programme.title: Let's Make Laugh
programme.desc: When a young housewife's debt-ridden, philandering husband leaves her with a mountain of tax debts, a security guard is hired by the tax authority to guard the assets, but he starts falling for her instead.

programme.title: Iceman
programme.desc: Falsely accused of murder, Ming Dynasty Imperial Guard Ying is pursued by his three sworn brothers until a fierce battle leaves all four entombed in ice. Four hundred years later, they awaken in modern Hong Kong, where they must reignite their ancient feud in a world they can barely recognize.

programme.title: The Grey Men 2
programme.desc: Triad boss Song seeks to whitewash his image and seize Laika's mayoral seat amid a regime change. He faces a funding shortfall despite colluding with officials, and gets his right-hand man and enforcer to commit crimes to boost his funds and power. Just as Song believes success is imminent, the dynamics between the three take an unexpected turn...

programme.title: Legend Of The Dragon
programme.desc: A young man Lung leaves his rural home on a small island to seek fortune in Hong Kong. His uncle cons Lung to play in a snooker tournament using his father's land as the bet. Lung lost the match but luckily, his childhood friend Momo encourages him to compete again using her land as the bet. Can he finally win his land back?

programme.title: My School Mate, The Barbarian
programme.desc: Edward attends a new school which has a reputation for fighting. Student leader Stone, befriends Edward, but their friendship is tested when a local triad leader discovers that Edward comes from a wealthy family.

programme.title: The Story Of My Son
programme.desc: Li attempts to make a fortune at the horse-racing tracks, but is subsequently entangled with loan sharks. Li becomes debt-laden while his sons are harassed by debt collectors, when more heart-wrenching events begin to unfold.

programme.title: Seeding Of A Ghost
programme.desc: It's an erotic gore-fest starring Kao Fei who seeks vengeance against his wife's rapists and killers by soliciting the help of a demented magician. In return, he endures copulating dead bodies as his enemies perish in blood spurting and body exploding glory. It's one of Hong Kong goriest films ever made.

programme.title: Puppy Love
programme.desc: To the tune of the Osmonds hit song, this is a story of adolescent playfulness & innocence lost. Two best friends grow up together and teasingly meet two delightfully impish boys leading to the four to flirtatiously intermingle. However, the innocence of partner swapping eventually leads to a roller-coaster bouts of misunderstood emotions.

programme.title: The Long Chase
programme.desc: Governor Yan is killed and his guard Fan identifies Kou as the assassin by his signature weapon, a dart. Kou is listed as a wanted man when he enters the city, but managed to escape arrest with the help of the innkeeper's daughter. At the same time, Fan is attacked by a bandit who pretends to be Kou. What are the secret plots behind these attacks?

programme.title: When the Clouds Roll By
programme.desc: Su is a schizophrenic who refuses to believe that her pilot lover is killed in a plane crash and makes up stories to deal with things. She runs into an old classmate Lai, who is also a doctor one day, and he finds ways to treat her illness. Su slowly recovers and accepts the reality, as well as her newfound love.

programme.title: Diary of a Lady-killer
programme.desc: Tycoon Zhou is a playboy who is engaged to be married, but that did not keep him from working his charms on as many ladies as he can. He keeps a diary about his romantic escapades and soon, the women with whom he has been intimate with are being murdered one by one. Zhou becomes the number one suspect by the police but is the killer someone else?

programme.title: The Perfumed Arrow
programme.desc: A charming Huangmei Opera title, this is the story of Fei E, a General's daughter who grows up fooling everyone that she is a boy, including her two closest schoolmates. When she has to choose one of them to marry, how will Fei E tell them that she is a girl? To complicate matters, a girl who Fei E saves one day only wants to be married to her!

programme.title: River of Tears
programme.desc: Retired singer Fang lives happily with her husband and son. Tragedy happens when a man from her past returns to haunt her. In an ensuing struggle to free her from his clutches, her husband dies in a car accident. Blamed by her father-in-law for her husband's death, Fang gets chased out of the house and goes back to singing to make a living...

programme.title: To Kill a Jaguar
programme.desc: Set in 1920s Shanghai, a village girl journeys to the big city in search of her father and meets her childhood friend Jaguar, who works for the mob boss Kam. In a world controlled by the mobs, it is a test of survival for all as Jaguar allies himself with ace gunman Ko Tang, to take over Kam's empire.

programme.title: The Crimson Palm
programme.desc: Poor student Lin is engaged to the daughter of a rich man who despises him because of his family's declining status. Lin visits his fiancee before leaving for the Imperial examination, but finds a maid lying dead in blood. As Lin's bloody handprint is left on the site, he is accused of the murder. How can Justice Bao prove his innocence?

programme.title: Shaolin Temple
programme.desc: As more people are learning martial arts from Shaolin, the Qing court orders for it to be banned and plans to destroy the temple. The Shaolin disciples decide to take their protest to the streets, using Shaolin skills to curb their hatred, but when the Qing troops start attacking Shaolin Temple, the disciples vow to protect it at all costs.

programme.title: Emperor Chien Lung and the Beauty
programme.desc: Emperor Chien Lung meets a famous courtesan in Suzhou and in order to spend as much time as possible with her, he builds a direct underground tunnel into the Forbidden City. The emperor's sudden appearances through this direct access shock his people but it is also at this time that he helps the needy and cracks the gambling business in Suzhou.

programme.title: Killer Clans
programme.desc: This intriguing wuxia saga is packed with conspiracies, power schemes and sword fights to produce a perfect blend of great action and gripping drama. The movie centres around the struggle for underworld supremacy between two clans, where the line between good and evil is not always that clear-cut.

programme.title: King Drummer
programme.desc: A young musician Chi Chiang is hired by the manager of a popular band when the group's drummer/leader Charlie, quits to join a rival group. The new drummer becomes an immediate hit, causing Charlie to be very jealous. Furthermore, the young drummer's mother is dead set against him having a music career.

programme.title: The Brave Archer 2
programme.desc: Knowing Guo Jing has won Huang Rong's hand in marriage using the kung fu learned from Jiu Yin manual, Ouyang Feng captures Huang and agrees to release her only if Guo can dictate the content of the manual. Will Guo give in to the threat?

programme.title: Lady General Hua Mu-Lan
programme.desc: Mulan disguises herself as a male soldier to replace her aged father in a war against the barbarians. Her courage brings her victory in battles and she was promoted to a general. When Mulan returns home with glory, the chief commander asks her to marry his daughter, forcing Mulan to reveal her true identity.

programme.title: Heaven and Hell
programme.desc: When an angel, Ling, decides to help his two friends who have fallen in love to escape from Heaven, he is sent to live as a human on earth as his punishment. Reincarnated as a cab driver, he sacrifices his own life to save another ill-fated couple and lands in hell, where he has to face off against the ghosts and demons to fight his way out!

programme.title: Torrent Of Desire
programme.desc: Rich playboy David is a drunk until he falls in love with a fashion model Dan Feng and marries her. David's sister Mona is in love with his best friend Han Ming, who rejected her as he secretly loves Dan Feng as well. Out of jealousy and hatred, Mona lies to David about a fake affair between Han Ming and Dan Feng...

programme.title: Clan Feuds
programme.desc: Tie Zhong Tang, the adopted son of the Great Banner Sect leader, is hunted by the sect's rival for the secret to its hidden treasure. To uncover the truth, he journeys to an island seeking the "Empress of the Day", only to find her dead. There, he unexpectedly meets the sect's founder, the "Emperor of the Night", who reveals that he is Tie's biological father.

programme.title: Gossip Street
programme.desc: All neighbours gather to gossip in flat number 8 on the second floor of the Gossip Street apartment building! Most of the residents are common people from all walks of life and there is never a lack of laughter or sarcasm in the neighbourhood. However, when a local mobster wants to change the place into a gambling den, things get serious...

programme.title: The Bride from Hell
programme.desc: A young business man marries a pretty and much sought-after young bride, not knowing that she carries the spirit of a girl raped by her uncle and murdered along with her parents. Justice must be done, and it ain't pretty!

programme.title: Emperor Chien Lung
programme.desc: Emperor Chien Lung goes incognito to mix with his people and understand their needs. He encounters many strange things along the way, including being arrested and nearly beheaded. Who will save him?

programme.title: The Avenging Eagle
programme.desc: Qi Ming Xing, an assassin of the Iron Boat Clan, decides to quit the clan. When hunted by the clan, he is saved by Swordsman Zhuo Yi Fan. Zhuo accidentally discovers that Qi is the killer of his wife, but forgives him after knowing Qi's guilt over her death. The two finally team up to destroy the evil clan.

programme.title: The Mirror and the Lichee
programme.desc: The curious title in this Huangmei Opera romance refers to the two props that signal a happy beginning between a scholar and a local beauty. The scholar polishes mirrors so as to be closer to his love, who signals her approval by tossing him some lichees. From that point on the course of their love becomes rocky, complete with murder and suicide.

programme.title: The Sword of Swords
programme.desc: The Sword Master passes on his sword to his disciple Lin before he dies. However, Lin soon discovers that another disciple Fang also eyes the sword and plots to take it away from Lin, destroying his family and blinding him in the process. Finally, Lin battles Fang for revenge and vows to reclaim his sword.

programme.title: The Empress Dowager
programme.desc: Award-winning drama featuring a passionate performance by Lisa Lu, enhanced by sumptuous costumes and sets, produces a powerful, fascinating story. In five thousand years of Chinese history, there was never a more fascinating woman than the dragon lady of the Ching Dynasty, also the Empress Dowager, who was the power behind the throne for the last half of the 19th century. The vast tapestry of palace intrigues is vividly brought to the screen.

programme.title: The Magic Blade
programme.desc: The movie depicts Fu Hong Xue fighting against the formidable conspirator Master Yu and seeing through his deception. The brilliantly choreographed fights, glorious settings, superb cinematography and strong casts define this movie as a highpoint in Wu Xia cinema.

programme.title: Princess Iron Fan
programme.desc: As Monkey and his gang make their way to the West through Fire Mountain, they ran into the evil Princess Iron Fan, Madam White Bone and her sexy sister, and have to fight their way through.

programme.title: Demon of the Lute
programme.desc: Lute demon Chin Mo has reappeared in the world to wreak havoc. Hsiao Feng Ling is ordered to help find a special bow and arrows that can counter the demon. Only Chiao Yin knows the whereabouts of the weapon. Hsiao and her classmate Old Naughty set out on an arduous journey to find Chiao. After overcoming many obstacles, they catch Chin Mo's man trying to snatch the bow and manage to stop him in time....

programme.title: The Love Eterne
programme.desc: Ying Tai disguises herself as a boy to go to school and falls hopelessly in love with her classmate, Shan Bo. After Shan Bo realizes her true identity, he proposes marriage to Ying Tai. However, they are kept apart as she is engaged to another man. Knowing Shan Bo died in despair, Ying Tai is in deep sorrow and kills herself at his grave.

programme.title: King Gambler
programme.desc: This film was actually a lively forerunner to the gambling film craze, which eventually swept Asian cinema. Here, it's cardsharp versus cardsharp with a lot more kung-fu action, in a battle of wits and fists to become the king of the casino. The double stings and triple crosses raise in complexity and imagination until what started as an unusual box office risk became a top ten hit of 1976.

programme.title: Shao Kang's War Room
programme.desc: Shao Kang's War Room is a Talkshow hosted by Zhao Shao Kang. This programme combines TVBS News source and Mr. Zhao's rich political and media background, to analyse important news deeply.

programme.title: Global Golden Line
programme.desc: It is the first professional reality car show, providing concrete evaluations of cars on the market, the deepest appreciation for classic cars, the hottest trends in the motoring world, and analysis of the latest auto tech trends.

programme.title: Chop Chop Show
programme.desc: The show invites younger generations to talk about relationship, career, entertainment, current affairs, and all the other popular topics that they care and complain about.

programme.title: Citizens' Subjects
programme.desc: Citizens' Subjects utilizes the perspective of Taiwan people and Taiwan events to tell the stories of Taiwan. It takes a light-hearted, humorous approach to interpreting current affairs.

programme.title: Queen
programme.desc: From makeup, skincare, hairstyle, clothing, horoscopes, parenting, to travel, all kinds of fashion-related topics are presented in the program. Pauline Lan leads dozens of professionals and experts across categories to offer the best fashion insights and tips.

programme.title: Global Focus
programme.desc: Bringing you the latest political, economy, information technology and breaking news around the world.

programme.title: All About Health
programme.desc: How well do you know your body? What should you eat to be healthy and energetic? Are health tips available online reliable? Tune in to this programme as the hosts give you all the answers!

programme.desc: A news programme that provides the latest Taiwan and international news, as well as in-depth analyses of important issues around the world.

programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Hilarious Family - EP 22
programme.desc: This heartwarming drama tells the story of Du Ruyu (Liu Lin), a single mother who has been widowed for 18 years, raising her four daughters, each with very different personalities, on her own. The family is filled with both laughter and tears.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 851-900) VVD Mandarin - EP 857
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.
